title: Add standard image comparison metrics, tolerance-based compare, and difference image generation
body: Surveyed ImageMagick, .NET MAUI `VisualTestUtils.MagickNet`, and other image comparison libraries to identify commonly-provided features missing from `SKPixelComparer`. ### New metrics on `SKPixelComparisonResult` - `SumSquaredError` (long) — raw Σ(ΔR² + ΔG² + ΔB²) - `MeanAbsoluteError` — per-channel MAE, range [0, 255] - `MeanSquaredError` — per-channel MSE - `RootMeanSquaredError` — RMSE (the metric MAUI's `MagickNetVisualComparer` uses) - `NormalizedRootMeanSquaredError` — RMSE / 255, range [0, 1] for threshold checks - `PeakSignalToNoiseRatio` — PSNR in dB ### Tolerance-based comparison Like ImageMagick's `fuzz` — a uniform per-pixel threshold without needing a full mask image. Overloads for all input types (file paths, `SKImage`, `SKBitmap`, `SKPixmap`). ```csharp // Ignore pixels where total |ΔR|+|ΔG|+|ΔB| ≤ 10 var result = SKPixelComparer.Compare(expected, actual, tolerance: 10); ``` ### Per-channel difference image `GenerateDifferenceImage` produces actual RGB difference values per pixel (vs. `GenerateDifferenceMask` which is binary B/W). Similar to ImageMagick's `compare` output. ```csharp using var diff = SKPixelComparer.GenerateDifferenceImage(expected, actual); // diff pixel RGB = absolute per-channel differences ``` ### Backward compatibility Old 3-param `SKPixelComparisonResult` constructor preserved as an overload delegating to the new 4-param constructor. ### XML documentation All new public APIs have complete XML doc comments — tolerance-based `Compare` overloads, `GenerateDifferenceImage` overloads, new `SKPixelComparisonResult` constructor and metric properties. ### Blazor sample updated The Pixel Comparer demo page now showcases all new features: - **Metrics display**: All 8 metrics shown with descriptive sub-notes explaining what each one measures - **Tolerance slider**: Interactive control (using `oninput` for real-time updates, range 0–765) to adjust tolerance and see filtered results while dragging - **Difference Image**: Per-channel difference visualization shown alongside the existing binary difference mask - **Responsive layout**: On phones, mask and diff images stack below the comparison images (2-per-row); on large screens all 4 panels display in a single row. Metrics cards also reflow to 2-per-row on extra-small screens. **Mobile (375px):** **Tolerance slider at 400:** ### Tests 22 new tests covering metrics correctness, tolerance filtering, difference image output, and edge cases. --- 💡 You can make Copilot smarter by setting up custom instructions, customizing its development environment and configuring Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers. Learn more [Copilot coding agent tips](https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips) in the docs.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot+claude-opus-4.6 please review these code changes and make sure we are doing it right.

I reviewed the full diff across all 4 changed files. Here's a summary:

**Metrics (SKPixelComparisonResult)** — All formulas are mathematically correct and follow standard definitions used by ImageMagick and MAUI's `MagickNetVisualComparer`:
- MAE/MSE normalize by `TotalPixels × 3` (per-channel average)
- PSNR uses standard `10 × log₁₀(MAX² / MSE)` with `∞` for identical images
- `SumSquaredError` uses `long` to prevent overflow on large images

**Tolerance-based comparison** — Semantics match ImageMagick's fuzz: pixels with `|ΔR|+|ΔG|+|ΔB| ≤ tolerance` are excluded from all metrics. `tolerance=0` is verified equivalent to standard comparison via test.

**Backward compatibility** — Old 3-param `SKPixelComparisonResult` constructor preserved, chains to new 4-param constructor with `sumSquaredError: 0`.

**`GenerateDifferenceImage`** — Follows same pattern as existing `GenerateDifferenceMask`.

**Tests** — 22 new tests covering metric correctness (boundary + formula), tolerance edge cases, and diff image. All 63 tests pass (41 original + 22 new).

No issues found — the implementation looks correct.

comments.author: Copilot
comments.body:
> @copilot+claude-opus-4.6 can you make sure to update the sample and ensure all the apis have docs.

Done in 336c0e7.

**XML docs added** to all new public APIs:
- `SKPixelComparisonResult`: 4-param constructor, `SumSquaredError`, `MeanAbsoluteError`, `MeanSquaredError`, `RootMeanSquaredError`, `NormalizedRootMeanSquaredError`, `PeakSignalToNoiseRatio`
- `SKPixelComparer`: all 4 tolerance-based `Compare` overloads, all 4 `GenerateDifferenceImage` overloads

**Blazor sample updated** with:
- New metrics row (MAE, RMSE, NRMSE, PSNR)
- Interactive tolerance slider
- Difference Image panel alongside the Difference Mask
- Links to API and documentation pages
